name: Multi-bidder comparison — single scope
description: Extract data from 8 subcontractor bid PDFs for a single scope of work and produce a comparison Excel workbook with as-submitted line items

inputs.user_prompt: I received 8 bids for Division 09 - Finishes (flooring, tiling, concrete finishing). Please tabulate these bids into a comparison spreadsheet. The scope of work specs and finish schedule are in the Scope of Work folder.

expected_behavior: Reads first bid to discover data structure and presents fields to user
Processes all bid PDFs (pdfplumber with vision fallback)
Extracts base bid amount from each bidder
Extracts line items as-submitted — preserves original descriptions without normalization
Captures exclusions, qualifications, and scope inclusions from each bid
Identifies alternates and unit prices if present
Produces a valid .xlsx with Comparison Summary, per-bidder detail tabs, Exclusions & Qualifications, and Scope Gaps tabs
Flags scope gaps (items present in some bids but not others) without attempting normalization
ground_truth_notes: PM-verified ground truth YAML with master scope (17 line items), 8 per-bidder sections (company info, line items, exclusions, qualifications, base bid total), and bid summary.

bidder_detection.description: All bid PDFs processed and represented in output (count match)

amount_accuracy.description: Base bid amounts match ground truth within $1 tolerance

line_item_completeness.description: Percentage of actual line items from each bid captured in per-bidder tabs

exclusions_qualifications.description: Percentage of exclusions and qualifications correctly captured

format.description: Valid xlsx with all required tabs, correct headers, low bid highlighted

graph.description: Finding written with correct type, scope, and bidder count
